metadata.title: Claude Code IDE Pro
metadata.description: Claude Code IDE Pro Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: createEl
ast.source: button
ast.target: 按钮

ast.name: createEl
ast.source: div
ast.target: div

ast.name: error
ast.source: [claude-code-ide] server error
ast.target: [claude-code-ide] 服务器错误

ast.name: error
ast.source: [claude-code-ide] failed to start server
ast.target: [claude-code-ide] 启动服务器失败

ast.name: error
ast.source: [claude-code-ide] notifier cleanup error
ast.target: [claude-code-ide] 通知器清理错误

ast.name: error
ast.source: [claude-code-ide] lockfile cleanup error
ast.target: [claude-code-ide] 锁文件清理错误

ast.name: error
ast.source: [claude-code-ide] server stop error
ast.target: [claude-code-ide] 服务器停止错误

ast.name: log
ast.source: [claude-code-ide] unloaded
ast.target: [claude-code-ide] 已卸载

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum characters returned by getActiveNoteContent. Longer notes are truncated and flagged with truncated: true.
ast.target: getActiveNoteContent 返回的最大字符数。较长的笔记会被截断，并标记 truncated: true。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hard cap on filename + content hits returned per search.
ast.target: 每次搜索返回的文件名 + 内容匹配项的硬性上限。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Characters of surrounding context per content match.
ast.target: 每个内容匹配项周围的上下文字符数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When off, files under folders starting with '.' (like .obsidian) are excluded from searchVault and listFilesInFolder.
ast.target: 关闭时，以 '.' 开头的文件夹（如 .obsidian）下的文件将被排除在 searchVault 和 listFilesInFolder 之外。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Active-note content cap
ast.target: 活动笔记内容上限

ast.name: setName
ast.source: searchVault max results
ast.target: searchVault 最大结果数

ast.name: setName
ast.source: searchVault excerpt length
ast.target: searchVault 摘录长度

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Include hidden folders
ast.target: 包含隐藏文件夹

ast.name: setTitle
ast.source: Send selection to Claude
ast.target: 将选中内容发送给 Claude

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Claude Code: no IDE client connected. Type /ide in the Claude pane first.
ast.target: Claude Code：没有 IDE 客户端连接。请先在 Claude 面板中输入 /ide。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Claude Code IDE: desktop-only plugin
ast.target: Claude Code IDE：仅限桌面端插件

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Claude Code IDE: vault adapter is not a filesystem
ast.target: Claude Code IDE：存储适配器不是文件系统

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Claude Code IDE: failed to start (see console)
ast.target: Claude Code IDE：启动失败（请查看控制台）

ast.name: description
ast.source: List the user's open markdown tabs in Obsidian.
ast.target: 列出用户在 Obsidian 中打开的 Markdown 标签页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get the current selection in the active markdown editor.
ast.target: 获取活动 Markdown 编辑器中的当前选中内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get the most recent non-empty selection observed across editors.
ast.target: 获取在所有编辑器中观察到的最近一次非空选中内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Return the workspace folder(s) Obsidian has open.
ast.target: 返回 Obsidian 打开的工作区文件夹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Report whether a given file has unsaved changes.
ast.target: 报告给定文件是否有未保存的更改。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Absolute or vault-relative path
ast.target: 绝对路径或相对于存储库的路径

ast.name: description
ast.source: Persist a file's unsaved changes to disk.
ast.target: 将文件的未保存更改持久化到磁盘。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Close the tab whose label matches the given name.
ast.target: 关闭标签页显示名称与给定名称匹配的标签页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The tab's display label (file basename or path)
ast.target: 标签页的显示名称（文件基本名或路径）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Open a file in Obsidian, optionally scrolling to a specific line.
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 中打开文件，可选择滚动到特定行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Absolute or vault-relative path to the file
ast.target: 文件的绝对路径或相对于存储库的路径

ast.name: description
ast.source: Open as preview tab (currently ignored in Obsidian)
ast.target: 以预览标签页打开（目前在 Obsidian 中被忽略）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Text snippet to locate selection start
ast.target: 用于定位选区开始位置的文本片段

ast.name: description
ast.source: Text snippet to locate selection end
ast.target: 用于定位选区结束位置的文本片段

ast.name: description
ast.source: Extend selection to end-of-line of startText match
ast.target: 将选区扩展到 startText 匹配项的行尾

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reveal the leaf so it's visible (default true)
ast.target: 显示该叶子节点使其可见（默认为 true）

ast.name: description
ast.source: 0-based line number to scroll to (Obsidian extension)
ast.target: 要滚动到的行号（从 0 开始）（Obsidian 扩展）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Return LSP-style diagnostics. Obsidian has no LSP, so this is always empty.
ast.target: 返回 LSP 风格的诊断信息。Obsidian 没有 LSP，因此此字段始终为空。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Execute code in a kernel. Obsidian has no Jupyter integration.
ast.target: 在内核中执行代码。Obsidian 没有 Jupyter 集成。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Open a side-by-side diff for a proposed file edit. Blocks until the user accepts or rejects.
ast.target: 为提议的文件编辑打开并排差异视图。会阻塞直到用户接受或拒绝。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path of the file being edited (vault-relative or absolute).
ast.target: 正在编辑的文件路径（相对于存储库或绝对路径）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Destination path (usually same as old_file_path).
ast.target: 目标路径（通常与 old_file_path 相同）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Proposed new file contents.
ast.target: 提议的新文件内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional display label for the diff tab.
ast.target: 差异标签页的可选显示名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Close any Claude-created diff tabs.
ast.target: 关闭所有由 Claude 创建的差异标签页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the full text of the active markdown note. Long notes are truncated; check `truncated` and `totalChars` in the response.
ast.target: 读取活动 Markdown 笔记的完整文本。较长的笔记会被截断；请检查响应中的 `truncated` 和 `totalChars`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional — defaults to the active note.
ast.target: 可选 — 默认为活动笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List every file that links to the given note. Uses Obsidian's metadata cache, so aliases and unresolved-link rewrites are respected.
ast.target: 列出所有链接到给定笔记的文件。使用 Obsidian 的元数据缓存，因此会尊重别名和未解析链接的重写。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path of the target file. Defaults to the active note.
ast.target: 目标文件的路径。默认为活动笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List every wikilink and markdown link in the given note, with each resolved target (or null if unresolved).
ast.target: 列出给定笔记中的每个 wikilink 和 Markdown 链接，并附带每个解析后的目标（如果未解析则为 null）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path of the source file. Defaults to the active note.
ast.target: 源文件的路径。默认为活动笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Resolve a wikilink target (like 'Anna' or 'Anna|Display Text') to its canonical vault file path. Respects aliases.
ast.target: 解析 wikilink 目标（如 'Anna' 或 'Anna|Display Text'）为其规范的存储库文件路径。尊重别名。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The link text inside [[ ]] — e.g. 'Anna' or 'Wiki/Characters/Anna'.
ast.target: [[ ]] 内的链接文本 — 例如 'Anna' 或 'Wiki/Characters/Anna'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Source file path for relative resolution. Defaults to the active note.
ast.target: 用于相对解析的源文件路径。默认为活动笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Return the YAML frontmatter, tags, and heading outline of the given note.
ast.target: 返回给定笔记的 YAML frontmatter、标签和标题大纲。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defaults to the active note.
ast.target: 默认为活动笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search the vault by filename and/or content. Returns ranked hits with excerpts. For 'filename' scope, matches the basename; for 'content', greps cached file text.
ast.target: 按文件名和/或内容搜索存储库。返回带有摘录的排名匹配项。对于 'filename' 范围，匹配基本名；对于 'content'，搜索缓存的文件文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search query (case-insensitive substring or basename match).
ast.target: 搜索查询（不区分大小写的子字符串或基本名匹配）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 'filename' | 'content' | 'both' (default both)
ast.target: 'filename' | 'content' | 'both'（默认为 both）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Restrict to a folder prefix (vault-relative).
ast.target: 限制到文件夹前缀（相对于存储库）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Override the default cap from settings.
ast.target: 覆盖设置中的默认上限。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Return today's daily-note path (or the date you specify). Reads the Daily Notes plugin's folder + date-format settings if installed.
ast.target: 返回今天的每日笔记路径（或您指定的日期）。如果已安装，会读取 Daily Notes 插件的文件夹 + 日期格式设置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today.
ast.target: ISO 日期（YYYY-MM-DD）。默认为今天。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List markdown files under a vault folder (recursive by default).
ast.target: 列出存储库文件夹下的 Markdown 文件（默认递归）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative folder path (use '' for vault root).
ast.target: 相对于存储库的文件夹路径（使用 '' 表示存储库根目录）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Recurse into subfolders (default true).
ast.target: 递归进入子文件夹（默认为 true）。

ast.name: error
ast.source: No active or specified note.
ast.target: 没有活动或指定的笔记。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Empty wikilink.
ast.target: 空的 wikilink。

ast.name: icon
ast.source: send
ast.target: 发送

ast.name: message
ast.source: executeCode is not supported in Obsidian (no Jupyter kernel).
ast.target: executeCode 在 Obsidian 中不受支持（没有 Jupyter 内核）。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Send to Claude (selection or whole note)
ast.target: 发送给 Claude（选中内容或整个笔记）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Reject
ast.target: 拒绝

ast.name: text
ast.source: Accept
ast.target: 接受

ast.name: text
ast.source: Claude Code IDE
ast.target: Claude Code IDE

ast.name: text
ast.source: These settings tune the Obsidian-native MCP tools the plugin exposes to Claude Code. Wire-layer settings (port, auth) are managed automatically.
ast.target: 这些设置调整插件向 Claude Code 暴露的 Obsidian 原生 MCP 工具。连接层设置（端口、认证）会自动管理。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Connection
ast.target: 连接

ast.name: text
ast.source: Lockfile is rewritten on every plugin enable (port is OS-picked).
ast.target: 锁文件在每次插件启用时重写（端口由操作系统选择）。
